metadata.description: Dev10x plugin marketplace — structured workflows for commits, PRs, tickets, QA, and more

plugins.name: fundamentals
plugins.description: Core guardrails, JTBD drafting, scoping, session orchestration, and PR context detection.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Atomic commits, worktrees, history grooming, and branch hygiene.

plugins.name: gh
plugins.description: PR lifecycle: create, review, triage, respond, monitor, and request reviews on GitHub.

plugins.name: db
plugins.description: Safe read-only database query planning and execution.

plugins.name: tickets
plugins.description: Branch creation, Linear integration, JTBD ticket workflows, and scoping.

plugins.name: sessions
plugins.description: Session task tracking, wrap-up, and handover between Claude sessions.

plugins.name: parking
plugins.description: Defer, park, and rediscover work items across PRs, todos, and Slack.

plugins.name: py
plugins.description: UV installation and Python script tooling with PEP 723 inline metadata.

plugins.name: skills
plugins.description: Skill authoring, audit, and index for Claude Code plugin development.

plugins.name: slack
plugins.description: Slack notifications, review requests, and Slack-based work item reminders.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: QA scoping, self-QA execution via Playwright, and e2e coverage analysis.
